Officers of the House
Joanna McClinton Speaker
David H. Brogan Parliamentarian
Brooke Wheeler Chief Clerk
Jennifer A. Benko Comptroller
Democratic LEADERSHIP
Matthew Bradford Majority Leader
Michael Schlossberg Majority Whip
Jordan Harris Majority Appropriations Committee Chair
Robert Matzie Majority Caucus Chair
Ryan Bizzarro Majority Policy Chair
Leanne Krueger Majority Caucus Administrator
Tina Davis Majority Caucus Secretary
Republican LEADERSHIP
Jesse Topper Republican Leader
Timothy J. O'Neal Republican Whip
James Struzzi Republican Appropriations Committee Chair
Martina White Republican Caucus Chair
David Rowe Republican Policy Chair
Sheryl Delozier Republican Caucus Administrator
Clint Owlett Republican Caucus Secretary
